title: Swift: Use @MainActor for UI ViewModels
Swift: Prefer @Observable over ObservableObject
Swift: Use structured concurrency
Ruby: Use frozen_string_literal
body:
Add `# frozen_string_literal: true` at the top of Ruby files to improve performance and catch string mutation bugs.

This should be the first line:
```ruby
# frozen_string_literal: true

class MyClass
  # ...
end
```

title: TypeScript: Prefer const assertions for literals
Git: Write descriptive commit messages
body:
Follow conventional commit format for clear history:

```
<type>(<scope>): <subject>

<body>

<footer>
```

Types: feat, fix, docs, style, refactor, test, chore

Example:
```
feat(auth): add OAuth2 login support

- Implement Google OAuth provider
- Add token refresh logic
- Store tokens in keychain

Closes #123
```

title: Tests: Name tests descriptively
Error Handling: Use typed errors
